fields.label: Employee Contributions
fields.description: Contributions deducted from employee salary

fields.label: Employee Sickness Rate (%)
fields.description: Employee contribution for sickness scheme (2% of capped salary)

fields.label: Employee Maternity Rate (%)
fields.description: Employee contribution for maternity scheme (1% of capped salary)

fields.label: Medical/Sickness Ceiling (Monthly)
fields.description: Maximum monthly salary subject to medical/sickness contributions (LL 120M as of Aug 2025)

fields.label: Employer Contributions
fields.description: Contributions paid by employer (not deducted from employee)

fields.label: Employer Sickness Rate (%)
fields.description: Employer contribution for sickness branch (7% of capped salary)

fields.label: Employer Maternity Rate (%)
fields.description: Employer contribution for maternity branch (1% of capped salary)

fields.label: Family Allowance Rate (%)
fields.description: Employer contribution for family allowance branch

fields.label: End of Service Rate (%)
fields.description: Employer contribution for end-of-service indemnity (no ceiling)

fields.label: Sickness Ceiling (Monthly)
fields.description: Maximum monthly salary for sickness & maternity (same as medical ceiling)

fields.label: Family Allowance Ceiling (Monthly)
fields.description: Maximum monthly salary for family allowance contributions (LL 18M as of Jul 2025)

fields.options: Note: End of Service contributions are calculated on total annual earnings with no ceiling.

fields.label: Progressive Income Tax Slabs (Annual)
fields.description: Lebanese payroll tax brackets per 2022 Budget Law (Article 57 Income Tax Law)

fields.label: Personal Deductions (Annual)
fields.description: Family deductions from taxable income per 2024 Budget Law (Article 49)

fields.label: Personal Allowance (Annual)
fields.description: Annual personal tax-free allowance for single taxpayer

fields.label: Spouse Allowance (Annual)
fields.description: Additional annual allowance for non-working spouse

fields.label: Per Child Allowance (Annual)
fields.description: Annual tax deduction per dependent child

fields.label: Transport Allowance
fields.description: Per Decree 12966 dated 15 February 2024

fields.label: Daily Transport Allowance
fields.description: LL 450,000/day for private sector (effective Feb 2024)

fields.label: Monthly Transport Allowance
fields.description: Auto-calculated: Daily × Working Days

fields.label: Annual Schooling Allowance (Total)
fields.description: Maximum total annual schooling allowance

fields.label: NSSF Family Allowances (Monthly)
fields.description: Amounts paid by NSSF to insured employees (Memorandum 793, effective Jul 2025)

fields.label: Spouse Allowance
fields.description: Monthly family allowance for spouse

fields.label: Per Child Allowance
fields.description: Monthly family allowance per child

fields.label: End of Service Indemnity
fields.description: Per Lebanese Labour Law - Article 50

fields.label: Months per Year (Years 1-5)
fields.description: 1 month salary per year of service for the first 5 years

fields.label: Months per Year (Years 6-10)
fields.description: 1.5 months salary per year of service for years 6-10

fields.label: Months per Year (Above 10 Years)
fields.description: 2 months salary per year of service beyond 10 years

fields.label: EoS Tax Rate (%)
fields.description: Tax rate applied to end-of-service indemnity

fields.label: Generate Payroll Master Data
fields.description: Create or clear Lebanese payroll setup records (Salary Components, Income Tax Slab, Payroll Constants, Salary Structure) for the selected company.

fields.label: Data Created
fields.description: Checked when payroll data has been generated
